title: Knicks Tracker & Event Scheduler
lede: Review upcoming scheduled fixtures and analyse recent scoring behaviour.

sections.title: Upcoming Schedule
sections.description: The next five fixtures to organise and prepare for.

sections.title: Scoring Trend
sections.description: Jalen Brunson's points across the last five starts.

demoSteps: Load the web interface to view the deterministic data dashboard.
Verify the L5 average calculates to 31.2.
Check the L3 average highlights as positive, as 33.7 is greater than the 30-point threshold.
Ensure the schedule table accurately reflects the 5-game local fixture.
notes: Utilises static local fixtures to eliminate network variance.
Ensures tone remains factual without hype language.
UI adopts the confirmed interactive scheduler approach while maintaining quick comprehension.
